information.shortIntroduction: I am passionate software wizard with 10+ years experience of Java, AWS, NodeJS
shortBriefLife: Apart from being a developer, I enjoy most of my time being outdoors. In the vacations, I am an motor rider to explore the worlds(and all the states of Vietnam). During the free time in my life, I enjoy mechanical keyboard building.

When forced indoors, I do practice with some kind of music instruments, I am an part-time guitarist, and I spend a large amount of my free time exploring the latest technology advancements in the full-stack development world.

workHistories.detail: Leading backend development of a regulated communications platform used by financial institutions. Architected and maintained high-throughput microservices handling millions of messages daily.
Built and maintained payment gateway integrations and financial transaction services. Collaborated in cross-functional agile teams across multiple time zones.
Delivered freelance full-stack projects for clients ranging from startups to SMEs. Responsible for requirements gathering, architecture, development and deployment.
Developed enterprise Java applications for US-based clients. Participated in full software development lifecycle including design, coding, testing and release.
Contributed to a secure e-government platform built for Swiss public sector clients. Focused on backend services and API integrations.
Developed custom web and mobile solutions for local businesses and international clients while studying.

certifications.name: Oracle Certified Professional, Java SE 8 Programmer
